name: Suspicious ConfigSecurityPolicy Execution with Network Connections
description: Detection of ConfigSecurityPolicy.exe executing with command-line URL indicators, suggesting potential abuse for malware download (Ingress Tool Transfer) or data exfiltration (Exfiltration Over Web Service).

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when ConfigSecurityPolicy.exe was executed.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the ConfigSecurityPolicy.exe executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of ConfigSecurityPolicy.exe, including the URL.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that executed ConfigSecurityPolicy.exe.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process of ConfigSecurityPolicy.exe.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon event ID (expected to be 1).

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
